violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Pan of food on floor. Bag of food on floor.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Wet cloth sitting food contact surface.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove plastic film from paper towel holder and shelfs below warmer. -Remove foil from under grill.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Plastic cups etc. were sitting on floor.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -No soap at handwash sink.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Chorizo and sour cream sitting in counter.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Need probe thermometer that reads from 0F-220F.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink had a broken faucet. Allowed use of bay in 3 comp sink for 1 day only.
